gate: M4 Linux proc.run namespace and rlimit canary
command: docker run --rm --privileged -v $PWD:/workspace:ro -w /workspace -e CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/tm-m4-executable-fd-target -e TM_LINUX_ISOLATION_TESTS=1 -e TM_M4_AMBIENT_SECRET=must-not-cross rust:1.88-trixie sh -lc '<install bubblewrap and busybox-static into /opt/tempestmiku-isolation-runtime, export the recorded PATH, then cargo test -p tm-host linked::tests::linux_isolation::gated_linux_bubblewrap_proc_run_enforces_profile -- --exact --test-threads=1 --nocapture>'

profile.mounts: root-owned static runtime read-only; descriptor-pinned linked root, cwd, and executable; private tmpfs; proc and dev

scopeBoundary.proven: actual argv-vector proc.run execution through bubblewrap namespaces, descriptor-pinned launcher/linked-root/cwd/executable identity across concurrent path replacement, trusted canonical launcher/runtime ancestry, filtered environment, and an observed RLIMIT_NOFILE ceiling in a disposable Linux environment
notProven: a production Linux host canary outside Docker
descriptor-based executable launch on non-Linux Unix hosts
